place_prompt.text: I want to build a trip around {{place}}. {{details}} Please suggest the best route, how many nights to allow, what to combine it with, and ask me for any missing dates, group size, budget, and travel-style details.

hero.eyebrow: AI Trip Planner · human-reviewed before booking
hero.lead: Tell the planner what kind of Zanzibar, safari, honeymoon, family trip, or beach escape you want. It will ask the useful questions and shape a route our team can price properly.

prompts.title: Choose a planning angle.
prompts.lead: Pick the closest starting point and the planner will open with that context already loaded.

items.label: Safari + beach
items.title: Build a bush-to-beach route
items.text: We are planning 8 to 10 nights. We want a short safari, Zanzibar beach time, good food, and a smooth route without too many hotel changes. Can you suggest a plan?

items.label: Honeymoon
items.title: Plan something romantic
items.text: We are a honeymoon couple. We want 7 nights with a beautiful beach hotel, one private dinner, a dhow sunset, and maybe a short fly-in safari. Mid-range to luxury.

items.label: Family
items.title: Make it easy with kids
items.text: We are a family with children and want a relaxed Zanzibar trip with safe activities, wildlife or turtles, snorkeling if conditions are easy, and not too many early mornings.

items.label: Culture + ocean
items.title: Mix local life and water
items.text: I want Stone Town, spice farms, local food, a dhow day, snorkeling, and a beach area that still feels relaxed. Please suggest a balanced itinerary.

items.title: Tell it the shape
items.text: Dates, guests, budget, pace, and what you care about most.

items.title: Get a first draft
items.text: The planner sketches nights, regions, excursions, safaris, and daily rhythm.

items.title: Send it to us
items.text: Our team checks availability, prices it properly, and turns the draft into a bookable trip.

cta.title: Want us to turn the draft into a quote?
cta.text: Send the plan, dates, group size, and travel style. We'll check availability and come back with a real route and a real price.
